MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2012 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing (as to Defendant/Cross Defendant Action Village, LLC.)
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

David A. Sauers, Esq. for the Plaintiff: SysIQ, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Elyia Vinogradsky was placed under oath and direct examined.
Frank S. Moore, Esq. for the Defendant/Cross Plaintiff Action Village, Inc.
No appearance by Defendant/Cross Defendant Action Village, LLC.
Stipulation for entry of judgment (settlement) between SysIQ, Inc. vs. Action Village, Inc. was filed in court prior to the Prove-Up vs. Action Village LLC.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants Action Village, Inc. and Action Village, LLC. for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $
Costs and Attorney Fees - Reserved.
Total - $

Counsel to prepare the Judgment & submitted to Dept. 514 for signature.

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Self-represented Defendant Action Village LLC for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Defendant Action Village LLC is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set at this time due to the proximity of the Trial Date. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Ntc Of Motio Top Compel Answes
Off Calendar Jan-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Gary Alabaster of The Sapiro Law Firm, (415)771-0100. Appearing for plaintiff;
No appearance by deftendant.

Ruling - PLAINTIFF SYSIQ, INC.'s Motion to compel answers to form interrogatories and response to request for production of documents is granted. Order was signed in open court. Rebecca Woodson Judge Pro Tem, not reported. - (302/HK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

APPEARANCES - ATTY. KHOA NGO OF SNR DENTON, TEL. NO. 882-0117, MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.
